untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'Adam & Adam Double Bottom' requires identification of twin spike bottoms at same price level with rounded/irregular connecting turn and specific volume profile (higher left bottom, U-shaped recession). These are multi-bar morphological features requiring pattern detection algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set. Current indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, volume ratio) cannot detect this complex shape pattern. Only approximated entry logic using volume and moving average crossover.
translation_notes: The core signal requires visual pattern recognition (twin bottoms, rounded connection, volume shape) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. A simplified approximation using volume comparison and price action relative to SMA-20 has been provided as a fallback, but this does not capture the nuanced pattern definition. For accurate implementation, a dedicated pattern recognition module or custom multi-bar analysis function would be required.
